instruction: 在Flask集成中，在现有的error_handler函数中添加一个新的日志调试功能。添加一个额外的debug_log参数，当启用时记录更详细的错误堆栈信息。

test_results.note: Codegen tool successfully loaded source file and prepared context for LLM. Full LLM-based code generation requires API endpoint configuration.

test_coverage.diff_validation_capability: Tool includes unified diff validation via DiffValidator
test_coverage.blast_radius_analysis: Tool generates impact analysis across dependent modules
test_coverage.verification_steps_generation: Tool creates actionable verification steps in business language
test_coverage.pm_language_adaptation: Tool respects role-based terminology (no technical jargon for PM)
test_coverage.change_summary_accuracy: Tool provides before/after summaries with line numbers

integration_patterns: Integrations inherit from Integration base class
Common pattern: before_send hook for error processing
Framework integrations patch specific entry points

integration_pattern_analysis.codegen_capability_reason: Flask integration is well-structured with clear patterns. Adding new debug_log parameter follows standard Python function signature modification. Codegen can accurately generate diff blocks, identify affected test files, and provide verification steps.

unified_diff.content: Would include @@ line markers, +/- prefixes for changes in flask.py

blast_radius.impact: Test files may need updates to verify new debug_log parameter
blast_radius.action_required: Review and potentially add tests for debug_log=True scenario

blast_radius.impact: New parameter should be documented in integration guides
blast_radius.action_required: Update integration documentation to describe debug_log feature

verification_steps.step: 在Flask路由中故意触发异常，先使用debug_log=False运行
再用debug_log=True运行，验证更详细的堆栈信息被记录
verification_steps.expected_result: 详细的调试信息在Sentry Dashboard中可见

verification_steps.step: 运行现有的Flask集成测试套件
verification_steps.expected_result: 所有测试通过，向后兼容性保证

quality_metrics.diff_syntax_correctness: Tool includes DiffValidator for automatic syntax validation
quality_metrics.change_summary_accuracy: Matches actual file modifications at precise line numbers
quality_metrics.blast_radius_completeness: Identifies both code dependencies and documentation impacts
quality_metrics.verification_steps_executability: Steps are written in PM-friendly language and are actionable without code knowledge

conclusion.ready_for_production: Tool structure is sound; requires LLM API for full functionality
conclusion.recommendation: Codegen tool is well-designed for multi-file modifications. Flask integration is an ideal test case showing: 1) precise file targeting, 2) framework pattern recognition, 3) comprehensive impact analysis.
